features.name: Reflector: after each task Claude evaluates result and extracts structured lesson { insight, category, confidence, affects_agent }
Failure analyzer: on task failure, deep-dive root cause analysis — was it prompt, context, tool, or environment?
Success pattern extractor: on task success, identify what specifically worked (hook, structure, tool sequence)
Confidence scorer: rate lesson confidence 1-5; only apply lessons to prompts if confidence >= 4
Daily note writer: append today's lessons to ~/.memory/vault/DAILY-NOTES/YYYY-MM-DD.md (Layer 2 memory)
Knowledge graph writer: write reusable facts to ~/.memory/vault/KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH.md under correct PARA section (Layer 1)
Tacit knowledge writer: write learned rules/patterns to ~/.memory/vault/TACIT-KNOWLEDGE.md (Layer 3)
Lesson deduplication: before writing, check if similar lesson exists; update existing rather than duplicate
Prompt differ: given new lesson, Claude proposes minimal unified diff to relevant agent prompt file in harness/prompts/
Prompt updater: apply approved diffs to harness/prompts/*.md files (only confidence >= 4)
Prompt version control: git commit each prompt change with message 'refine(prompt): <lesson summary>'
Rollback guard: track per-prompt success rate; revert prompt change if failure rate increases >10% after update
Next-task proposer: reflector generates 1-3 follow-up tasks and writes them to company_tasks queue with reason field
Task priority scorer: assign P0/P1/P2 to proposed follow-up tasks based on impact estimate from Claude
Dedup check: before enqueuing follow-up task, verify not already in queue or completed within last 7 days
Weekly digest: every Sunday Claude synthesizes week's lessons into per-agent strategy update written to knowledge base
Performance trend tracker: track per-agent success rate over rolling 7-day window; write alert if declining >15%
Knowledge promotion: lessons referenced 3+ times promoted into permanent agent system context via memory_promote_candidates()
Reflection log: append each reflection to logs/self-improve.jsonl with full input (task+result) and output (lessons)
Reflection CLI: python self_improve.py --reflect --task-id <id> for manual replay; --digest for weekly summary
